findings.issue: Proficiency bonus is listed as 3, but a level-1 character always has a proficiency bonus of +2 in D&D 2024. +3 does not occur until level 5.

notes: Other fields verified correct from memory: AC 16 (chain mail, or studded leather + shield + defense); HP 12 = 10 + CON +2; passivePerception 13 = 10 + WIS +1 + perception prof +2; saves str/con (Fighter); fightingStyle defense is legal; originFeat 'chanceux'/Lucky is a valid 2024 Origin feat that a Human may take via the Versatile trait; cantrips/preparedSpells empty is correct (base Fighter has no spellcasting). Ability scores treated as the character's final scores, so not flagged. NOTE: the passivePerception 13 (with proficiencyBonus 3 the sheet's own math would give 14) is consistent once PB is corrected to 2.
